message:
🐛 Fix Playwright nightly: add kc-demo-mode to setupDashboardTest, fix RCE nav race (#10309)

setupDashboardTest() was missing kc-demo-mode in localStorage, causing
Dashboard.spec.ts to attempt real API calls against vite preview (no backend).
Firefox/WebKit stall on unmocked requests, leading to toBeVisible() failures.

rce-vector-scan.spec.ts caught page.evaluate() after a swallowed navigation
failure in Firefox — 'Execution context was destroyed'. Fall back to
domcontentloaded instead of silently swallowing the goto error.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
